metadata.description: Marcov Beam Pipeline (MBP) — full-stack B2B pursuit engine connecting research, marketing, analytics, and sales in a single measurement chain.

plugins.name: marcov-beam-pipeline
plugins.description: Full-stack B2B pursuit engine. 14 skills spanning research (b2b-research, tender), paid marketing (google-ads, linkedin-ads), organic marketing (seo, content-intel), content (linkedin-post, presentation, nano-banana), measurement (website-analytics, marketing-dashboard), sales (beam-selling), and operations (data-quality, notifications). All skills share normalised metrics, UTM taxonomy, and brand guidelines for closed-loop attribution from first touch to revenue.
